input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule D.7.1.2 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: d.7.1.2
            TITLE: the efficiency event is considered a separate event although it is conducted simultaneously

            CONTENT:
            rule D.7.1.2: The Efficiency Event is considered a separate event although it is conducted simultaneously
D.7.1.2 The Efficiency Event is considered a separate event although it is conducted simultaneously 
with the Endurance Event. 
A minimum of four drivers are required to participate in all of the dynamic events.

final_answer: The Efficiency Event is considered a separate event although it is conducted simultaneously with the Endurance Event. A minimum of four drivers are required to participate in all of the dynamic events.
